chapter_title.ar: باب الْأَكْلِ وَ الشُّرْبِ فِي آنِيَةِ الذَّهَبِ وَ الْفِضَّةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 19 – Eating and drinking in a vessel of the gold and the silver

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/67)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/67)
text: أَنَّهُ نَهَى عَنْ آنِيَةِ الذَّهَبِ وَ الْفِضَّةِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Al A’ala Bin Razeyn, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> that he<sup>asws</sup> forbade (eating and drinking) from a vessel of silver and gold’.
en.sarwar: 4. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad, from ibn Mahbub from al-‘Ala’ ibn Razin from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, prohibited the use of utensils of gold and silver.’”
